content.en:
After entering the True Legendless Land, Ye Tian continued to cultivate.

As time passed, his will and body fused more and more, getting closer and closer to oneness.

Finally, after the fourth tribulation, Ye Tian's will and body fused to a certain extent.

It was at this time that Ye Tian's body began to undergo qualitative changes.

Bang!!!!!

Every particle in Ye Tian's body began to transform, becoming more and more powerful, and countless origin energy from the outside world poured into his body, prompting his body strength to become stronger and stronger.

Moreover, Ye Tian's will has also improved a lot.

After a long time, Ye Tian's transformation was completed.

At this point, he was much stronger than before.

Now, if he goes to attack the Eternal Realm, he will become the Lord of the Immortal Realm after breaking through.

But Ye Tian was not in a hurry to break through, after all, once he broke through to the Immortal Realm, and continued to fuse his will and body, the difficulty would be much greater than the current "Nine Eight Zero", so there was no need for him to rush to break through, it was better to stay in the Nine Extremes Realm for a few more years in the Half-Step Eternal Realm.

Anyway, his lifespan is infinite, unlike those half-step Eternal Realms in the space-time territory, the limit of his lifespan is 10 million eternal years, so they will not stay in the half-step Eternal Realm like this all the time, and they will definitely be promoted to the Eternal Realm a little earlier.

Another tribulation years have passed, and Ye Tian has come out of the truth.

This time, he began to break through to the tenth floor of the True Legends Tower.

Once he passes this level, he will be able to gain 10 Tribulation Yuan cultivation time, which is a huge temptation for him!

Tenth floor.

Ye Tian fought with the three Eternal Realm opponents, and their battle caused the tenth layer of the void to shake.

The three Eternal Realms of the tenth layer are indeed very powerful, and there will be more than one Will Eternal Technique, but Ye Tian's strength is also extremely strong, and he has stubbornly resisted these three Eternal Realms.

Abrupt.

These three Eternal Realms jointly performed a Will Eternal Technique, if it was a real Eternal Realm, naturally they couldn't do this, but these Eternal Realms were just condensed by the True Legend Tower, so they could be used whatever they wanted.

Airplanes!!!

A Void Ball of Will appeared in the void, enveloping Ye Tian in it.

Immediately, the Will Void Ball began to compress, the internal void continued to collapse, and the eternal rules were all shattering, and it was impossible to withstand the power of this Will Void Ball.

Such a Will Eternal Technique blocked all of Ye Tian's paths, and he couldn't dodge it at all.

"Nothingness!"

"Eternal Extreme Dao Fist!"

Ye Tian wanted to shatter this will void ball regardless of his injury.

Bang!!!!

The Will Void Ball continued to crack, but Ye Tian also had a lot of will injuries on his body. Grab a sudden hunger

The Void Ball of Will burst open, shattering directly into nothingness in a fragmented area.

In the twisted and broken nothingness, Ye Tian walked in, covered in blood, if it weren't for the true body of nothingness, he really couldn't stop it. I have to say that the Will Eternal Technique jointly performed by these three Eternal Realms is indeed terrifying.

However, Ye Tian already knew about their move, so he had a countermeasure, and he would not give you another chance to join forces.

Next.

Ye Tian fought with the three Eternal Realms at an extremely fast speed, exerting the power of the legendary Eternal Technique.

Suddenly, the three Eternal Realms couldn't join forces to cast the Will Void Ball, and once it was time to cast it, Ye Tian used the Infernal Legend Eternal Technique to interrupt it.

The battle continued like this, until a long time later, Ye Tiancai killed the three Eternal Realms one by one and broke through the tenth layer, and he also paid a heavy injury.

"If I encounter such three Eternal Realms in the outside world, I will definitely die!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, the Eternal Realm condensed by the True Legend Tower did not have the recovery power of the True Eternal Realm, otherwise, he would not be able to consume these three Eternal Realms.

But this is the breakthrough of the True Legend Tower, if the eternal realm here can be restored, then it will be too difficult to pass the tenth layer, at least he is far from being able to do it.

This time, he obtained 10 Tribulation Yuan cultivation time, Ye Tian did not keep it, and entered the True Legend Land again, continuing to improve the fusion of will and body.

In a flash, another ten years of calamity have passed.

At this time, the degree of integration between his will and body has increased a little, but it is far from reaching the level of qualitative change, and the increase in strength is not too large.

He went to break through the eleventh floor, but unfortunately failed.

Therefore, in a short period of time, he could not break through the eleventh layer.

This ruin is not without other opportunities other than the True Legend Tower.

Through chatting with the Stargazing Sword Ancestor, he also knew that there was an opportunity here, but not every Eternal Realm could obtain harvests and benefits, so not many Eternal Realms valued it.

Wow!

Ye Tian walked in the shattered void of the ruins, and soon came to a broken palace in the ruins.

After entering this palace, he came to a special place...

Here, there are many immortal realms existing, and there is even a legendary lord, that is, the Lord of Ice Letter

Ye Tian arched his hand, but did not speak, so as not to disturb them.

In fact, these Immortal Realms and the Legendary Lord Ice Han didn't care about his arrival, and were still silently contemplating and cultivating.

Ye Tian's gaze was quickly attracted by a sword.

In the void, there is a silver long sword, it seems illusory, but it is extremely real, staring carefully, as if you have seen a sword world spreading endless heaven and earth, every wisp of sword qi seems to be able to smash an immortal realm existence.

Compared to the sword path of this long sword itself, the sword path of one of the many avenues that Ye Tian comprehended was not worth mentioning at all, he also comprehended the innate eternal sword path rules, but compared to the sword dao aura here, it was simply too low-level.

It exists at the source of endless time and space, exists in any heaven and earth, as if it is very close, and it seems that it is not in this side of time and space, and it is not in the territory of time and space.

Ye Tian's will wanted to touch this sword, but his will traveled through time and space, but it still felt out of reach, as if his will would never reach the location where this sword was.

"It's like a true Dao trace tree, untouchable!"

Ye Tian was quite surprised.

He had heard the Stargazing Sword Ancestor say that there was such a sword here, and the Stargazing Sword Ancestor had been here for enlightenment, but he didn't know that this sword was untouchable.

"That's right, if you can touch it, the six legendary lords will take it away directly!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Although the way of the sword is not 2.9 Ye Tian's main path, it is also a part of the endless path, so it is also beneficial for him to meditate here.

However, Ye Tian came here not to comprehend the way of the sword, but to create a more powerful Eternal Compression Secret Technique.

The Stargazing Sword Ancestor said that this sword can affect the power of eternity, and even more so the power of half-step eternity.

Its kendo aura was too condensed, far beyond the power of eternity, so many eternal realms tried to comprehend the aura of kendo and created a secret method through this sword to compress the eternal power or half-step eternal power in the body.

In fact, quite a few people did.

For example, the six legendary lords have created a very powerful eternal compression secret technique, but ordinary people can't obtain it.

Although Ye Tian had also created an eternal compression secret technique that could compress eighty times, it was of no use to him at all now.

Therefore, he wanted to use this sword to create a more powerful Eternal Compression Secret Technique. _
